name: icon

files.content:
import { ark } from '@ark-ui/react/factory'
import type { ComponentProps } from 'react'
import { styled } from 'styled-system/jsx'
import { icon } from 'styled-system/recipes'

export type IconProps = ComponentProps<typeof Icon>
export const Icon = styled(ark.svg, icon, {
  defaultProps: { asChild: true },
})

visual_summary: icon is a icon UI component from the parkui corpus. It provides reusable other behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: icon
Description: icon is a icon UI component from the parkui corpus. It provides reusable other behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
Style: 
Interactions: 
Tags: icon, other, parkui

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// src/components/ui/icon.tsx
import { ark } from '@ark-ui/react/factory'
import type { ComponentProps } from 'react'
import { styled } from 'styled-system/jsx'
import { icon } from 'styled-system/recipes'

export type IconProps = ComponentProps<typeof Icon>
export const Icon = styled(ark.svg, icon, {
  defaultProps: { asChild: true },
})
